headline: ExchangiFi Accepted into Fintech Sandbox Data Access Residency Program
summary: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla., March 31, 2026--ExchangiFi, the 351 Exchange Marketplace connecting wealth managers with ETF issuers, has been accepted to the Fintech Sandbox Data Access Residency.
